docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ARDEN WEOOD MAINTENANCE WORKERS ASSOCIATION AS TO DEFENDANT ARDEN WOOD BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-01-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ARDEN WOOD BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ARDEN WOOD BENEVOLENT ASSOCIATION DISM W/O PREJUDICE TO THE RIGHT OF ANY INDIVIDUAL EMPLOYEE TO SUE FOR BENEFITS IN HIS OR HER BEHALF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
